summary: Successfully tested Google Auth integration, trending ticker, and societies redesign. All critical issues from iteration 3 have been resolved. Backend APIs now working with FastAPI reverse proxy, trending ticker visible and functional.

design_issues.issue: Minor selector issue with 'Arts & Culture' category button (data-testid naming)

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/activity/trending returns 8 simulated activities with isSimulated=true
Backend API: POST /api/auth/google with invalid sessionId returns 401 'Invalid or expired session'
Backend API: POST /api/auth/google with missing sessionId returns 400
Backend API: POST /api/auth/google with wrong data type returns 400
All basic pages load successfully (/, /login, /signup, /societies, /auth/callback)
Login page shows 'Continue with Google' button with Google logo above email form
Login page has 'OR SIGN IN WITH EMAIL' divider between Google button and email form
Login page left panel uses solid dark navy background (rgb(10, 46, 110))
Signup page shows 'Continue with Google' button with correct styling
Societies page loads with solid navy header (rgb(10, 46, 110))
Societies page has 'COMMUNITY' badge and 'TCD Societies' heading
Trending ticker now visible and functional with 16 scrolling activity items
Trending ticker shows proper activity messages like '🎫3 tickets just booked for Jazz Night at the Pav'
Trending ticker has CSS animation (animate-ticker) working correctly
Category filter pills present (All, Academic, Music, Sports & Fitness, Debate & Speaking, Social)
Most category filter pills are clickable and functional
Search functionality works on societies page
Auth callback page redirects to /login when no session_id parameter
Landing page hero section still functional
Design uses solid backgrounds instead of gradients throughout
success_percentage: backend: 100% (all endpoints working), frontend: 95% (minor category selector issue only)
